# primitives

Umbrella grouping Sonata-local client primitives — reusable, framework-agnostic
building blocks that are specific enough to Sonata's player surfaces that they
live alongside it rather than in the global `plugins/primitives/` tree.

Today it holds `inertial-drag`, the pointer-drag-with-release-momentum physics
hook the piano roll uses for its drag-to-scrub surface. Future Sonata-only
interaction primitives belong here too.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Umbrella for Sonata-local client primitives.
- Sub-plugins:
  - **`inertial-drag`** — 1-D pointer drag-to-scrub hook with exponential-friction release momentum (flick → coast → settle).
  - **`keyboard`** — Stateless piano keyboard: the single source of truth for laying out and drawing piano keys across a MIDI range, lighting given pitches (accent or per-key color) with optional per-key content. Composed by the full PianoKeyboard and the chord readout.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
